|--------|-------|----------|--------|------------|---------|-------|
| Mary Hartley | Born in Fairview, Kansas | 1890 | 1890 | High | Vitals | Fairview, Kansas |
| Mary Hartley | Married John Webb | 1912 | 1912 | Medium | Vitals | |
Update(T001): Mary said the wedding was in April.

## S002
| Person | Claim | Earliest | Latest | Confidence | Section | Place |
|--------|-------|----------|--------|------------|---------|-------|
| Thomas Hartley | Worked as a bookkeeper for the Plains Junction Railroad | 1880 | 1885 | Medium | Work | Fairview, Kansas |
